location.title: Kallikratia, Halkidiki
location.description: Kallikratia sits at the gateway to Halkidiki — where the Thermaic Gulf meets the Aegean peninsula. Established, authentic, and 30 minutes from Thessaloniki — without the crowds of the tourist south.

investment.title: Real Yield. Real Management.
investment.description: Greek real estate is appreciating at 12–18% YoY. Buy at pre-sale developer pricing, receive rental income from operation launch, and benefit from capital growth at handover — all without lifting a finger.

urgencyBar.availability: 14 of 25 units sold or reserved · Pre-sale pricing ends Q3 2025

contact.heading: Let’s start
contact.description: Our investment team will respond within one business day with a tailored presentation.
